rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance
Ritual / practice / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives
Register match — Godin × Sutherland × Siilasmaa (Bootstrap)
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 5: peer-warmth voice ('opens Claude Code') + line 27: straightforward mechanic explanation

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
Over-hedge detector
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + strategy docs, NOT student-facing body
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 28-29 explains mechanics (if-then causality), not value positioning

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 3-5: frame is positive (model explaining its own surface)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use
Business-audience word ban (Bootstrap default)
Memory vs context — use deliberately
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 31: 'context, tool choice, textual command, runtime action, result' — all operationally correct

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Golden path only in the body
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
Section headers use command verbs when the section is about doing something
rules_evaluated.evidence: **Prompt** headers are label-style (lecture demo, not action); appropriate for classroom demo context

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Inline links use the target's title, never its filename
rules_evaluated.evidence: no cross-module links in student-facing body

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose
Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow
rules_evaluated.evidence: no meta-pedagogy headers or contemplative-pause framing

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No placeholders inside fenced blocks
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 9: 'Ask these one at a time'; line 16: implicit (students demo); line 22: implicit (students demo)

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block
rules_evaluated.evidence: all three prompts follow lead-in + **Prompt** *(Claude Code)* + fence pattern

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Markdown shout dead weight inside fences
Mood contract named
rules_evaluated.evidence: demo lecture; no module Big Idea or Key Concepts section; mood is exploratory (mechanism-in-open)
